steps.d: We listen deeply — to your vision, your love story, your family's dreams. Every detail matters before a single pin is placed.
A bespoke creative direction is born — mood-boarded down to the ribbon. Color, texture, fragrance, flow.
From Udaipur palaces to Lake Como villas, Mumbai ballrooms to Bali clifftops — we find your perfect forever stage.
Florals, light, fabric, fragrance — sculpted by our artisan team into a living, breathing dreamscape.
An invisible orchestra of the world's finest photographers, chefs, artists, and performers — all conducted by us.
You arrive. We hold every thread. You only have to feel every single magical moment we've crafted just for you.

faqs.q: How far in advance should we book your services?
faqs.a: For weddings and large-scale destination events, we recommend securing our team 8 to 12 months in advance to ensure availability and ample planning time. For smaller private celebrations, 3 to 6 months is typically sufficient.

faqs.q: Do you plan destination weddings internationally?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Our expertise extends across borders. We have orchestrated seamless, luxurious events across Europe, the Middle East, and Southeast Asia, managing everything from legal logistics to guest hospitality.

faqs.q: Are you involved in the design or just coordination?
faqs.a: We provide comprehensive, end-to-end event production. This means we are heavily involved in the creative design, spatial planning, floral architecture, and entertainment curation, as well as the meticulous logistical coordination.

faqs.q: Do you offer partial planning or day-of coordination?
faqs.a: To maintain the uncompromising standard of our events, we exclusively accept full-service planning commissions. This ensures every detail aligns perfectly with our cinematic, high-end vision.

Our pricing is bespoke, tailored entirely to the scale, location, and complexity of your event. Following our initial consultation, we provide a customized proposal outlining our management fee and estimated production costs.

list.quote: Velvet didn't just plan a wedding — they bottled the way our grandparents fell in love and gave it back to us, in flowers.
Three days. Four ceremonies. Two countries. Not a single guest noticed anything but joy. That is artistry.
I cried walking into the mandap. It was the dream I never knew how to describe — they did, perfectly.

values.title: Personal Attention
values.desc: Every client gets a dedicated lead planner. You are never handed to a junior. We know your story like our own.

values.title: Obsessive Detail
values.desc: From the ribbon knot on your invitation to the scent in the air — every micro-decision is made with intention.

values.title: Global Reach
values.desc: We operate seamlessly across 32+ destinations — palaces, resorts, clifftops, vineyards — with local precision.

values.title: Transparent Pricing
values.desc: No hidden surprises. Our pricing is honest, structured, and designed around your vision — not the other way.

values.title: Always On Time
values.desc: In a decade, not a single event has started late. Logistics are our silent superpower.

values.title: Award-Winning Team
values.desc: Recognised across the industry — but our greatest award is watching you stand breathless at what we've created.

list.label: Our Heritage
list.title: Weddings
list.desc: Our heart and heritage. From intimate vows to grand royal celebrations — every love story deserves its perfect day, crafted with cinematic restraint, editorial taste, and an obsession with detail.

contentSections.title: The Vision
contentSections.text: We believe a wedding is not just an event, but a living, breathing expression of your love story. Our approach is entirely bespoke, ensuring that every floral arrangement, every draping, and every culinary choice reflects your unique personality and heritage.

contentSections.title: The Experience
contentSections.text: From the initial consultation to the final send-off, our team of dedicated planners and designers orchestrate every detail with surgical precision. We handle the complexities of vendor management, logistics, and scheduling so you can immerse yourself fully in the joy of your celebration.

list.label: Professional
list.title: Corporate Events
list.desc: Award ceremonies, product launches, conferences and galas with world-class production. We bring editorial flair and flawless execution to the grandest professional stages.

contentSections.title: Brand Elevation
contentSections.text: Your corporate event is a direct reflection of your brand's prestige. We design immersive environments that communicate your corporate identity while ensuring a seamless, high-end experience for your guests, stakeholders, and partners.

contentSections.title: Flawless Execution
contentSections.text: With our extensive experience in large-scale productions, we manage every technical and logistical aspect, from stage design and audiovisual production to premium hospitality, ensuring your event runs flawlessly from start to finish.

list.label: Milestones
list.title: Birthday Celebrations
list.desc: Milestone birthdays transformed into grand, unforgettable experiences. From elaborate themed parties to sophisticated elegant dinners, we orchestrate pure joy.

contentSections.title: Personalized Themes
contentSections.text: Every milestone deserves to be celebrated in a way that is uniquely yours. We conceptualize and execute highly personalized themes, transforming ordinary spaces into extraordinary worlds that captivate your guests.

contentSections.title: Curated Entertainment
contentSections.text: Beyond stunning visuals, we curate bespoke entertainment, conceptual entries, and gourmet food and beverage experiences to ensure your celebration is not just seen, but deeply felt and remembered.

list.label: High Society
list.title: Private Galas
list.desc: Exclusive dinner galas, charity balls and high-society soirées. We design opulent environments with impeccable table settings, crystal chandeliers, and cinematic lighting.

contentSections.title: Opulent Environments
contentSections.text: We specialize in creating environments of unparalleled opulence. From custom-built architectural elements to lush, cascading floral installations, we design spaces that leave a lasting impression on high-society guests.

contentSections.title: Impeccable Service
contentSections.text: A gala is defined by its service. We provide world-class hospitality, ensuring that every guest receives personalized, white-glove attention throughout the evening.

list.label: Global Reach
list.title: Destination Events
list.desc: Palaces, beaches, vineyards — we bring your vision wherever it takes us. We handle end-to-end logistics, travel, and production across 32+ international destinations.

contentSections.title: Global Expertise
contentSections.text: Our global reach allows us to execute events in some of the world's most exclusive and sought-after locations. From majestic heritage palaces in Rajasthan to pristine beaches in the Maldives, your vision knows no borders.

contentSections.title: End-to-End Logistics
contentSections.text: We manage every aspect of your destination event, including guest travel, accommodation, visa assistance, and international vendor coordination, providing a completely stress-free experience.

list.label: Intimate
list.title: Private Celebrations
list.desc: Anniversaries, engagements, baby showers — intimate elegance crafted with the same obsessive detail and uncompromising luxury as our grandest affairs.

contentSections.title: Intimate Elegance
contentSections.text: We believe that intimacy does not mean compromising on luxury. Our private celebrations are crafted with an extraordinary level of detail, creating a warm, inviting, and highly sophisticated atmosphere for your closest family and friends.

contentSections.title: Bespoke Details
contentSections.text: From personalized trousseau gifting and custom stationery to exquisite private dining experiences, every element is thoughtfully curated to reflect the significance of your special occasion.

footer.description: A premier event management company — crafting cinematic love stories, destination weddings & luxury celebrations across India.
